subject: fix(audit): Phases 5, 7 — UX/mobile fixes and performance
body:
Phase 5 — UX/Mobile:
- Root error boundary: already present (ErrorBoundary export from expo-router)
- Touch targets: increase header button minHeight 32→36, hitSlop 6→8 vertical
  (effective 52px, exceeds 44px WCAG AA minimum)
- Search button: add maxWidth 200 to prevent excessive width on tablets
- Station detail: add "Go Back" button to error/not-found state (router.back())
- LocationSearch: reduce suggestion dropdown maxHeight 220→160 for keyboard

Phase 7 — Performance:
- FuelMapWeb: memoize stationsToGeoJSON via useMemo (perf #8: O(n) conversion
  only runs when stations array changes, not on other effect deps)
- StationList: share single Animated.Value across 4 skeleton cards
  (perf #20: 4 concurrent animation loops → 1)
- index.tsx: depend on search parameter values directly instead of doSearch
  callback identity (perf #23: compound filter changes now batch into one
  debounced search instead of two)

Tags: audit, ux, mobile, performance, accessibility
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep
Semver: patch
